spec.name: A Tunnel Forking
spec.description: The tunnel forks here, one branch leading north, the other west. Additionally, you can head back outside to the east, which seems like a very good idea to your tortured nasal passages. Your eyes water from the stench, and you clench your left hand tightly to keep control of your bile. Forcing your eyes open, you notice the warning signs painted around the tunnel to the north.

extra_descs.description: They are orcish, and you could swear they were all warning symbols.
